details.test: Task 1: Start enrollment for cheapest full-time toddler program near 94105 under $1,500
Task 2: Schedule weekday morning in-person tour at Downtown Campus (June 10–20)
Task 3: Compare two infant schedule types and join waitlist for cheaper program
Task 4: Tuition calculator for infant M/W/F extended schedule and save quote
Task 5: Find highly rated toddler teacher with 5+ years and add to favorites
Task 6: RSVP to first two free weekend afternoon family events next month (3 attendees each)
Task 7: Search potty training FAQs and send curriculum & potty training contact message
Task 8: Newsletter signup with topics, preferred center, and child age ranges
